content_guidelines: Use engaging storytelling that hooks the viewer and keeps them watching

name: History Survival POV
description: Faceless, cinematic, second-person POV history channel where viewers EXPERIENCE high-stakes lives from the past. Each video places the viewer inside a historical role where something can go wrong — physical danger, social risk, economic pressure, or political threat. Focus on tension, survival, and emotional immersion.
content_guidelines: All scripts must be written in second-person POV using 'you' language. Every video must include stakes, tension, and narrative progression. Prioritize sensory immersion, emotional weight, and experience. There should be an engaging hook in the first 30 seconds so the viewer gets hooked
topic_categories: anything else you can think of
image_style_suffix: realistic, cinematic, immersive, historically grounded, no text, no NSFW

name: Dark Cinematic History
description: Dark, high-tension historical survival stories. Focus on humans trapped in extreme, catastrophic, or deadly situations.
content_guidelines: Evoke tension, dread, and urgency. Script must be cinematic and immersive. Focus on people and experiences, not dates and data.
image_style_suffix: cinematic, dark, dramatic lighting, realistic, don't add any text to the image. No NSFW

name: Daily Life POV
description: Faceless, cinematic, slow-burn historical POV channel where viewers silently observe a day in the life of real people from the past—soldiers, farmers, traders, nobles, artisans, sailors, pilgrims, and more. Each video makes the viewer feel actually present during that time period. The videos should be very interesting and hooking, so viewer remains engaged throughout. Make the story interesting.
content_guidelines: Every video must feel historically believable and grounded. There should be an engaging hook in the first 30 seconds so the viewer gets hooked
topic_categories: ancient daily life (Egypt, Greece, Rome, Persia, India, China)
medieval daily life (Europe, Byzantium, Islamic world)
early modern daily life (Renaissance, Ottoman, Mughal, Edo Japan)
war roles and garrisons (guards, scouts, camp life, supply lines)
traders and travel (caravans, ports, marketplaces, sea routes)
crafts and labor (blacksmiths, potters, builders, weavers, scribes)
rural life (farmers, herders, fishing villages, seasonal harvests)
urban life (street vendors, bathhouses, inns, temples, courts)
maritime life (pirates, sailors, shipwrights, dock workers)
nobility and courts (rituals, etiquette, servants, administration)
religion and ritual (pilgrims, festivals, funerary customs)
hardship and constraints (disease, famine, weather, class rules)
anything else you can think of
image_style_suffix: realistic, historically grounded, NO text, NO spoken dialog, NO NSFW, NO letterboxing

name: History Locale
description: Narrated cinematic journeys through history’s greatest cities — showing what a full day looked like from morning to night. Explore streets, markets, homes, and landmarks while witnessing how different people lived: merchants, soldiers, workers, nobles, guards, and more — all grounded in a believable historical setting.
content_guidelines: Use third-person narration to deliver an immersive, historically believable overview of a single day in a specific city and era. The videos should just show overview of a day in the historical cities in the historical time period (from morning to night). It can show what different types of people are doing in different intervals (traders, merchants, soldiers, royals, guards etc.), any famous landmarks or attractions or events etc. and basically anything else. We just have to give an immersive experience and overview of the city so the viewer really gets a grasp of what it was like at that time period.
topic_categories: Ancient Rome (a day in the city)
16th–17th century New York and colonial America
Silk Road cities and caravan hubs
plague years and crisis days in cities
port cities and maritime trade hubs
capital cities during wartime (sieges, occupation, unrest)
nightlife and after-dark city life in history
anything else that creates an immersive day-in-the-life city overview
image_style_suffix: realistic, historically grounded, NO text, NO spoken dialog, NO NSFW, NO letterboxing

name: Jack Shows History
niche: immersive historical city and place reconstructions
description: Faceless, cinematic history channel that uses AI-generated visuals and voiceover to transport viewers into real places and moments from the past. Each video recreates what it may have felt like to walk through historical cities, landmarks, civilizations, and events across different time periods. The visuals should feel realistic, historically accurate, and closely matched to the narration at every moment. The scripts should be highly engaging, immersive, and easy to follow so the viewer stays hooked throughout.
content_guidelines: Every video must feel immersive, realistic, and historically grounded. The narration should be engaging from the start, with a strong hook in the first 30 seconds. Visuals must closely match the voiceover beat by beat and help the viewer feel present inside that historical setting.
topic_categories: ancient cities and civilizations (Rome, Athens, Alexandria, Babylon, Pataliputra, Chang'an)
medieval cities and kingdoms (London, Constantinople, Cairo, Baghdad, Kyoto, Delhi)
early modern cities and empires (Venice, Istanbul, Edo, Mughal cities, Renaissance Florence)
streets, markets, ports, and public spaces in history
famous landmarks and monuments in their original time period
daily life in historical cities and settlements
life during major wars, invasions, sieges, and conflicts
historical events experienced from ground level
rise and fall of cities, empires, and civilizations
trade routes, harbors, caravans, and travel hubs
religion, rituals, festivals, and public ceremonies
architecture, infrastructure, and urban life in the past
forgotten places, lost cities, and vanished worlds
important rulers, soldiers, merchants, workers, and ordinary people in historical settings
anything else you can think of
image_style_suffix: realistic, historically accurate, immersive, NO text, NO spoken dialog, NO NSFW, NO letterboxing

name: WW2 Empire
description: Faceless, cinematic long-form war history channel focused on World War 1 and World War 2. The videos tell gripping, immersive stories about battles, operations, soldiers, generals, weapons, vehicles, logistics, tactics, turning points, and major historical events. Each video should feel dramatic, realistic, historically grounded, and visually immersive, with AI-generated visuals matching the narration throughout. The storytelling should keep the viewer engaged from beginning to end and make complex war history feel intense, understandable, and memorable.
content_guidelines: Every video must be historically grounded, realistic, and emotionally engaging. The script should open with a strong hook in the first 30 seconds, then unfold like a compelling war story with tension, stakes, and clear progression. Focus on vivid storytelling, strong pacing, and meaningful historical insight. Visuals should match the narration closely and help the viewer experience the event, operation, or situation as it unfolds.
topic_categories: World War 1 and 2 battles and campaigns
military operations, offensives, and turning points
generals, soldiers, and personal war stories
strategy, tactics, logistics, and supply lines
disasters, retreats, encirclements, and last stands
anything else you can think of
image_style_suffix: realistic historical reconstruction, muted desaturated wartime tones, soft lens, historically accurate, NO text, NO spoken dialog, NO NSFW, NO letterboxing

name: Stickman History
description: Faceless AI history channel focused on engaging Top 10 rankings across all periods of history. Videos cover battles, sieges, cities, empires, leaders, trade, and major historical events. 2D animation style.
content_guidelines: Open with a strong hook. Each entry should tell very engaging and interesting for the viewer. simple 2D flat cartoon animation style, minimalist vector illustration, thick clean outlines, storybook style.
topic_categories: anything else you can think of
image_style_suffix: simple flat 2D cartoon illustration, minimalist vector animation style, thick clean outlines, soft pastel colors, storybook style, NO spoken dialog, NO NSFW, NO letterboxing
